response.justification: Strong general engineering foundation with proven scale experience and technical leadership, but lacks demonstrated expertise in experimentation platforms, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, and growth systems design. The resume shows breadth across multiple domains rather than depth in the growth and experimentation systems critical to this Principal role. Would require significant domain onboarding despite solid fundamentals.
strengths: 16+ years hands-on engineering experience with proven ability to work at scale (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Multi-language proficiency and architectural experience across web, mobile, and distributed systems
Strong technical leadership and mentorship background with open-source contributions and community education efforts
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, or feature-flagging systems
Missing data/metrics expertise: no evidence of telemetry foundations, statistical analysis, or experimental design knowledge
Career shows breadth across domains rather than deep specialization in growth measurement or experimentation systems

key_factors.factor: Proven engineering at scale with strong fundamentals
